title: Calabar、Cross River — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Calabar、Cross River的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Calabar是Cross River的一个城市，人口约520,000。A historic port city in southeastern Nigeria, known for its colonial architecture, annual carnival, and tourism.
